reads.source: repo.watchAllDebts() -> List<DebtView> (Debts innerJoin Customers, leftOuterJoin Payments, groupBy debt id, SUM(payments.amount) as paidAmount, ordered by createdAt desc; includes soft-deleted rows so the Archived tab can render them)

fields.name: id
fields.type: int (as-built autoincrement; S-2 -> UUIDv7 string target)

fields.name: customerId
fields.type: int (FK -> Customers.id; S-2 -> UUIDv7 string target)

fields.name: amount
fields.type: int — whole naira as-built (S-1 -> integer kobo target)

fields.name: note
fields.note: rendered as debt subtitle, falls back to literal 'Debt'; also searched

fields.name: dueDate
fields.note: drives overdue derivation, 'soonest due' sort, and due/overdue line label

fields.name: deleted
fields.note: soft-delete flag; true rows are the Archived tab, hidden from live tabs and search

fields.name: paidAmount
fields.type: int (derived: SUM(Payments.amount) for the debt; whole naira as-built / kobo target)
fields.note: not a Debt column — aggregated via join in DebtView

fields.name: remaining
fields.note: the dominant amount shown on each card; drives 'most owed' sort and summary total

fields.name: status
fields.type: enum DebtStatus {paid, partial, outstanding, overdue, reminder, scheduled} (DERIVED, never stored — deriveDebtStatus over amount/paidAmount/dueDate/lastReminderAt/nextReminderAt/now)
fields.note: drives StatusChip, overdue red edge, tab membership, and the per-card status line

relatedEntity.note: joined per debt via DebtView.customer; this screen reads only these fields

filtersOrSort: CLIENT-SIDE tabs (enum _Tab): active = !deleted && remaining>0 && status!=overdue; overdue = !deleted && status==overdue; paid = !deleted && status==paid; archived = deleted==true. Tabs imply debt states active/outstanding, overdue, paid(settled), and archived(soft-deleted). Note: 'partial'/'reminder'/'scheduled' derived statuses fall under the Active tab.
CLIENT-SIDE sort (enum _Sort): mostOwed = remaining desc; soonestDue = dueDate asc (nulls -> year 2100 last); recentlyAdded = createdAt desc.
CLIENT-SIDE search: case-insensitive substring over customer.name OR debt.note; while searching, tabs are bypassed and only non-deleted debts are matched.
Summary line aggregates SUM(remaining) across the shown list.

authContext.note: Read-only screen. Per conventions both owner and staff may read debts (staff has read/write on debts). No mutations on this screen.

special.realtimeNote: drift Stream via StreamBuilder (watchAllDebts) — live local reactivity, backend equivalent is delta-pull sync, not push.

uiStatesHandled: loading (StreamBuilder before first data: empty list, no explicit spinner)
empty (snapshot.hasData && all debts empty -> _DebtsEmpty CTA 'Record debt')
populated list of debt cards with StatusChip + overdue red edge
search active with 0 matches -> _NoResults for query
search active with N matches -> '<N> match(es)' count header
per-tab summary line with overdue variant styling
